Consulate observed World Navkar Mahamantra Day in collaboration with Jain International Trade Organization (JITO), Atlanta, at its premises, with collective chanting of the sacred Navkar Mahamantra.

A cornerstone of Jainism, the mantra reflects universal values of humility, peace, and spiritual upliftment. The observance highlighted the enduring relevance of such traditions in fostering harmony, well-being, and community spirit.
